query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as table_exists FROM information_schema.tables 
WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'updates';

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Kz4ErUoqpGjgNg.dff2f62e1b6f --database nuXmcfyGeo7bacZX3ZUfKS --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as table_exists FROM information_schema.tables 
WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'updates';
